ContactPage.description: Tell us about your project. We create video, photography, social content, graphics and websites for brands, creators and companies.
ContactPage.lastNameDescription: You can add your last name optionally.
ContactPage.emailDescription: We’ll get back to you at this address.
ContactPage.phoneDescription: Optional - add a phone number if you want a quicker reply.
ContactPage.projectTypeDescription: Choose the option closest to your project.
ContactPage.messagePlaceholder: Describe your project, goals, scope and timeline...
ContactPage.messageDescription: Share your idea, goals and what you need help with.
ContactPage.success: Thanks. Your message has been sent.
ContactPage.error: The form could not be sent. Please try again.
ContactPage.sidebarText: We usually reply within 24-48 hours. A concrete brief speeds everything up.

errors.lastName: Please enter a valid last name.
errors.email: Please enter a valid email address.
errors.phone: Please enter a valid phone number.
errors.message: Your message must be at least 20 characters long.
